projects.name: Demo Sites Platform
projects.vision: Автоматизирана платформа за демо сайтове — Крис попълва, Koi билдва, клиентът вижда резултат за часове.

phases.name: Phase 1: Platform MVP
phases.summary: GitHub Pages платформа, JSON data backend, основен flow created→building→done.

phases.name: Phase 2: Automation Pipeline
phases.summary: Cron watcher, Telegram нотификации, webhook integration, auto-briefing от scraping.

phases.name: Phase 3: Template Library
phases.summary: Set A Premium v2 — 9 ниши × 5 = 45 multi-page темплейта. Счетоводните = еталон.

phases.name: Phase 4: Revision & Deploy Cycle
phases.summary: Пълен lifecycle: revision↔review→approved→dns_setup→deploying→live. Deploy repo workflow. Proxy auth v3.

phases.name: Phase 5: Scale & Set B
phases.summary: Set B темплейти (смели/модерни) за всички 8 ниши. Качество до ниво на счетоводните.

phases.name: Phase 6: Client Self-Service
phases.summary: Клиентски портал за feedback, одобрение, DNS setup.

goals.text: Автоматизиран flow от scraping до deploy
Set B темплейти за всички ниши

projects.name: ClawAI (OpenClaw as a Service)
projects.vision: AI асистенти за бизнеси — от подписване до live за 24ч. Два продукта: Starter (€28/мес, plug & play) и Clawsourcing (€550/мес, custom build).

phases.name: Phase 1: Research & Pricing
phases.summary: Конкурентен анализ (Felix Craft, Mahesha, Clawhosters). Pricing модел: 3 плана → 2 плана. Tech stack: Supabase + static HTML.

phases.name: Phase 2: Landing Page & Brand
phases.summary: ClawAI brand pivot. Двуезична landing page (BG/EN). Clawsourcing page. Обединение в една платформа.

phases.name: Phase 3: Database & Pipeline
phases.summary: Supabase: 17 таблици, RLS, миграция. Pipeline end-to-end: form → processor → handler → email. Два flow-а: Starter + Custom.

phases.name: Phase 4: Admin Dashboard
phases.summary: 1425 реда, 8 секции, login gate. Supabase-connected. PRIVATE repo след security incident.

phases.name: Phase 5: Stripe & Payments
phases.summary: Stripe backend на Vercel (clawai-stripe.vercel.app). Checkout: €28/мес + €280 setup. Webhook → Supabase → Telegram. Node 24 fix (native fetch). Success page.

phases.name: Phase 5b: Client Portal & Onboarding
phases.summary: GitHub Pages portal с 6-step onboarding wizard + status dashboard. Dark luxury тема, magic link auth → zero-email flow (Stripe→portal→auto-login→wizard). 10 код фиксове, 2 DB миграции, RLS policies. E2E 6/6, Playwright 14/14 PASS.

phases.name: Phase 6: Auto-Provisioning
phases.summary: DO API → Ansible → OpenClaw install → credentials → live. Пълна автоматизация.

phases.name: Phase 7: First Customer
phases.summary: Domain, SSL, production deploy. Първи платен клиент.

goals.text: End-to-end pipeline: форма → плащане → provisioning → live assistant
Landing page live с contact form

blockers: 🔴 Rotate Supabase JWT secret — чака Крис (ДЕН 4)

phases.name: Phase 1: Research & Design

phases.name: Phase 2: Prototype

phases.name: Phase 3: Execution Plan

blockers: 🔴 Блокер #1: Mac достъп за Xcode/iOS development

phases.name: Phase 5: Beta Testing
phases.summary: TestFlight beta с 50-100 бегачи. Iterate по feedback.

phases.name: Phase 6: App Store Launch
phases.summary: ASO, marketing, launch campaign. Revenue tracking.

blockers: 🔴 Mac достъп за iOS development (Xcode, SwiftUI, HealthKit)
